Ziyafet continues its Journey of Festival

Supported by Creative Industry Platform for postproduction and directed by Fırat Özeler, student of Radio, TV & Cinema Department, the short film “Ziyafet” get to the finals in İzmir Short Film Festival. Fırat Özeler’s film also participated in Sarajevo Film Festival and 28th Euroshort Film Festival Anthology in Poland.
